honest_gaps.reason: ceu_node_map has 35 nodes; 40.2 inventory has 944. The 910 unmapped nodes have no governed CEU assignment. Classified as UNMAPPED_STRUCTURAL_NODE — explicit coverage boundary, not a bug.
honest_gaps.severity: LOW — coverage boundary, not implementation gap

honest_gaps.reason: NODE-0950 (svg-agents/hasi-bridge/hasi_bridge.py) and NODE-0952 (svg-agents/sensor-collector/sensor_collector.py) in DOM layer have evidence_paths that don't resolve to 40.2 node IDs. These nodes drop from re-indexed DOM. CEU-09 (EDGE_AGENTS) evidence_refs still resolve correctly via path_to_node.
honest_gaps.severity: LOW — 2 of 35 DOM node IDs not re-indexed; evidence_refs unaffected

honest_gaps.reason: SIGNAL_SHORTCUT_RETAINED. Pre-computed conformance artifacts still used for signal computation. Generic binding may produce different signal values. Separate future migration stream required.
honest_gaps.severity: MEDIUM — documented, scoped, deferred by design

honest_gaps.gap: LENS compatibility with generic binding schema untested
honest_gaps.reason: LENS v2 may depend on pre-computed schema fields (bindings, domain_telemetry, pressure_zone_designations). Generic schema uses nodes, edges, capability_surfaces. Downstream verification needed.
honest_gaps.severity: MEDIUM — known downstream concern, not pipeline concern
